'''Garret Callron''' was the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Clacis sector/Legends|Clacis sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Callron employed the services of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Rodick Tag]] during the early days of Tag's career.<ref name="AIR" /> Four decades later, the Moff of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Callron]] the Younger was likely a relative to Garret Callron.<ref name="Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>

{{Char-stub}}
